underlying_goal: Fix multiple bugs and UX issues in a RAG chat application (UI errors, missing test questions, broken SSE streaming, health checks, layout) while enforcing team commit and behavior protocols
friction_detail: Claude repeatedly forgot to use the user's name and follow commit protocols stored in project files, and committed without permission causing a server startup loop
brief_summary: Eran wanted multiple bug fixes and UX improvements in his RAG app; Claude diagnosed and fixed most issues correctly but repeatedly violated stored team preferences (name usage, commit-permission rule) and introduced a server loop with one health-check commit that required further fixes.
